final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial photo of a primeval forest at dawn, capturing the mystical and serene atmosphere of untouched wilderness.

Style/medium: photorealistic landscape photography, 35mm film aesthetic with natural color grading
Composition: wide-angle shot, deep depth of field with foreground-to-background layering, low horizon line
Subject: ancient moss-covered boulders with ferns and wild mushrooms in foreground, towering redwood trunks in midground
Scene/backdrop: dense primeval forest interior, morning mist weaving through trees, distant mountain silhouettes, a winding clear mountain stream with reflections of green vegetation
Lighting/mood: early morning golden hour, first sunlight piercing dense canopy creating visible Tyndall light rays, soft atmospheric haze
Color palette: deep forest green as base, vibrant emerald green as anchor, warm golden sunlight as accent, natural earthy tones
Materials/textures: velvety moss on weathered stone, delicate fern fronds, smooth water surface with subtle ripples, rough bark texture
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial sharpening halos, plastic-looking vegetation, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, HDR over-processing
